note: This EPD does not use the standard EN 15804 A1-A3 module labelling. Instead it reports cradle-to-grave results split into Upstream, Core and Downstream modules. Declared unit is 1 kg of product including packaging. The values given here are the overall TOTAL (cradle-to-grave) column: GWP-fossil 3.25, GWP-biogenic -1.16, GWP-total 2.62, GWP-GHG 3.82 (kg CO2 eq.). These are not strictly A1-A3 production-stage values. If a production-stage equivalent (Upstream+Core) is needed: GWP-fossil ~3.03, GWP-biogenic ~-1.16, GWP-total ~2.39, GWP-GHG ~3.60.
